description: Section names that the agent-synthesized final report must contain. The tests/golden/run.py script only collects sources; an agent following the deep-research skill in a standalone workspace is expected to produce a report with these sections. Comparison is case-insensitive and substring-based.
note: When running run.py alone (no agent synthesis), these sections will not be present, and the compare tool will report them as missing. This is expected: run.py validates source collection; the agent validates synthesis.
